title: Look to buy Monster Beverage on a retracement as it breaks key resistance

title: Watch These 4 Soft Drink Stocks to Get an Insight on Industry Trends
text: The Beverages - Soft Drinks industry witnesses headwinds from supply-chain disruptions and higher input costs. Innovative product introductions are likely to aid companies like KO, PEP, KDP and MNST.

title: Celsius Trails Only Monster Beverage On Amazon: Here's Why The Energy Drink Stock Is Surging Today
text: Celsius Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: CELH) shares are trading higher Wednesday after the company reported better-than-expected financial results. Celsius said first-quarter revenue increased 167% year-over-year to $133.4 million, which beat the $114.05 million estimate, according to data from .

title: Monster Beverage Corporation (MNST) CEO Rodney Sacks On Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 5, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Rodney Sacks - Co-CEO Thomas Kelly - CFO Hilton Schlosberg - Vice Chairman and Co-CEO Conference Call Participants Dara Mohsenian - Morgan Stanley Andrea Teixeira - JPMorgan Bonnie Herzog - Goldman Sachs Kevin Grundy - Jefferies Mark Astrachan - Stifel Operator Good day, and welcome to the Monster Beverage Company's First Quarter 2020 Conference Call. title: Monster Beverage (MNST) Q1 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Monster Beverage (MNST) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -8.33% and 6.54%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Can Higher Costs Mar Monster Beverage's (MNST) Earnings in Q1?
text: Strength in the energy drinks business and higher demand are likely to have boosted Monster Beverage's (MNST) sales in Q1. Higher operating costs and supply-chain headwinds are expected to have hurt.
